description: Heey-Global org-wide Renovate preset. Repos inherit it with `"extends": ["local>Heey-Global/.github"]` so the shared policy (3-day stability window, vulnerability fast-track, h-teske assignment) lives in ONE place instead of being copy-pasted (and drifting) across every repo. This file is ALSO the config Renovate uses to manage the .github repo itself.

Digest cooldown coupling: the 3-day `minimumReleaseAge` below only protects updates that carry a datasource release timestamp (versions/tags). Digest updates (@sha256 / pinned action SHAs) carry NO timestamp, so Renovate parks them on `renovate/stability-days` forever. A repo that wants the cooldown on digests too must (a) exempt digests from `minimumReleaseAge` locally AND (b) wire the reusable `.github/workflows/digest-age-check.yml` as a required check, which re-imposes the cooldown using authoritative registry/commit dates. See Heey-Global/k8s for the reference wiring. This preset intentionally does NOT exempt digests, so extending it alone never silently drops a cooldown.

customManagers.description: Extract pinned npm package versions from `npm install -g pkg@version` lines inside reusable workflows. Renovate's stock github-actions manager only catches `uses:` action pins; inline package installs need this customManager to be visible. Annotation must sit directly above the install line — see `lockfile-lint.yml` for the canonical shape.
